_comment: XAUT (gold) venue sweep configuration - single source of truth for regimes & environment.
CSV paths relative to the repo root (run via `make sim-sweep-xaut`).
GOLD LEG SOURCE - PAXG/USDT (Binance, sim/data/fetch_binance_gold.sh), the documented
fallback: Dukascopy XAU/USD (fetch_dukascopy_gold.sh) tarpits bulk fetchers per-IP (~day-long
first fetch); PAXG is tokenized gold tracking spot within ~20-50bps (its on-chain redemption
arb held through 2022-2025, unlike Binance's GBPUSDT which depegged ~5% after GBP banking
rails closed mid-2023 - checked and REJECTED for the cable leg). Re-run on true XAU/USD when
the Dukascopy cache completes, as confirmation (windows in fetch_dukascopy_gold.sh).
PAXG trades 24/7, matching the Chainlink XAU/USD feed's observed weekend behavior (heartbeats
with small drift through the close - verified on-chain 2026-07-16).
shock-2022: gilt crisis x gold drawdown to ~$1,615 - both fair legs stressed at once;
surcharge cap + range breach + both oracle deadbands under violence. gas 10 gwei / ETH $1300.
calm-2024: calm cable (~1.25-1.29) x gold +17% then consolidation; the mid-intensity cell and
the sensitivity-table anchor. CONTAINS the real 2024-04-13 weekend squeeze (PAXG +25% in ~90
min while metal markets were closed - kept deliberately: it IS this venue's weekend-
dislocation risk). gas 1 gwei / ETH $3000.
rally-2025: gold up ~30% - fair RISES so the pool goes wstGBP-rich: exercises the mint-side
loop against the basis rest state, the venue's hardest cell. gas 1 gwei / ETH $2500.
nav: discrete weekly ratchet (the conveyor driver): 9 bps/week ~ 4.8% APY, phase 3d.
basis_bps: XAUt trades ~0.5% under the metal feed (ROADMAP.md 2026-07-11) - the ranking
cells run at this value; the sweep tables the winner's sensitivity to {0,25,50,100}.
